{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221959035EAC5301F1D32E68A69B"}"},"total":945},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486519411775193880","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看是好看！就是跟看过的另外一本剧情相似度得有个80%，唯一不同的是这本书男主家庭和睦，另外一本是离婚追夫文，虽然500章了还没看到追夫[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743096716,"group_id":"7473080079677934654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7UNF0tKizu4hI8BF3hbLMsdtgDBAzbz4wiYBECRYYUr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4105989941626220","user_name":"用户41059899"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4105989941626220","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7473080079677934654","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】+【系统】+【宠妻宠女儿狂魔】+【温馨日常】+【不穿越不重生】

　　人过三十，江天却失业了，老板带着小姨子卷款八千万跑路海外。

　　在妻子林婉清的安慰下，江天决定摆摊，没想到绑定了【最强摆摊系统】。

　　路边一碗朴实无华的炒饭，却让很多顾客破大防：“江老板的炒饭，是我这辈子吃过最好吃的炒饭！”

　　被同行恶意举报，江天直接在城管局门口摆摊自证清白！！

　　妻子：我老公是全天下最厉害的人！！

　　女儿：粑粑！我同桌说明天要用澳龙来换你做的炒饭！！

　　顾客们：江老板，再给我吃一口吧，就一口！！

　　城管：小江老板别跑，我真的是来吃炒饭的！！

　　多年后，江天站在厨神争霸赛的冠军讲台上，望着台下的妻女和观众，一脸愁容：“一开始，我只是想卖个炒饭。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e313d36a90ae0346f70501e60ea439cc","author":"看风月","author_id":"","book_id":"7473080079677934654","book_name":"我摆个摊而已，咋成国宴供应商了","book_short_name":"摆摊大王","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7473080083876430398","read_count":"57321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1519824"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"735","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/449ebc05041573cdb8dfcd7ec2fbb960~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364743&x-signature=arZ4oT9gbq3s72AHnHt9LB62Po0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4585638748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"72"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221959035EAC5301F1D32E68A69B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5314,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":11690},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531672441220989721","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉这个小说很有意思，比我看过的任何一个小说都不差，一般的小说我只看个开头，基本上都退了，但这个小说确实能提起很大兴趣，而且内容也挺新颖有趣的，不是那种老套招数，强烈推荐。我下载番茄小说，到现在加入书架的也只有两本小说，这就是第2本，真的推荐推荐推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753608456,"group_id":"7473080079677934654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我真的很喜欢番茄小说，而且写作也可以锻炼一下文凭和写作能力","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N18TW4u2vbEAd+Dj6IMCj9KH6Fyq4tGi1FwJjjSEtL5Y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e9fdd4e6d8854f0980782fbbd98130a7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705195&x-signature=UtIZjQsc9HJuWJLe3niZuM1IFWY%3D","user_id":"3097762222862151","user_name":"忠实书粉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3097762222862151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7473080079677934654","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】+【系统】+【宠妻宠女儿狂魔】+【温馨日常】+【不穿越不重生】
